final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input shift,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in;  // Load data on load signal
    end else if (shift) begin
        data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]};  // Shift right
    end
end

endmodule
